title: Revert banner image integration
objective: Remove the image-backed homepage banner and restore the prior CSS-only banner treatment that was in place before the banner asset was added.
instructions: Revert the homepage banner presentation to the pre-image state.
Remove the image-backed/contained hero styling from assets/main.css and restore the prior CSS-only banner panel behavior.
Delete the banner asset from the repo if it is no longer used.
Do not modify unrelated content sections such as schedule, submissions, contact, or navigation.
constraints: Do not perform any git operations.
Limit scope strictly to undoing the banner-image integration and its supporting asset.
expected_outputs: Banner styling restored to the previous CSS-only treatment and unused banner asset removed.
definition_of_done: Homepage no longer uses atlas-banner.png in the banner.
Banner CSS matches the prior non-image treatment.
ResultPacket lists changed/deleted artifacts and doc implications.
